SourceProxy.name: TemporalTransformsReader
SourceProxy.label: Temporal Transforms Reader

Documentation.long_help: Read time-indexed transforms (vtkTemporalTransforms) from CSV. Required columns: Time(s),Rx(Roll)(d),Ry(Pitch)(d),Rz(Yaw)(d),X(m),Y(m),Z(m). Optional columns: Longitude(d), Latitude(d), Altitude(m).

SourceProxy.Documentation: Read from a CSV a list of time indexed transforms. Usually these transforms represent the pose trajectory of a solid over time. Required columns: Time(s),Rx(Roll)(d),Ry(Pitch)(d),Rz(Yaw)(d),X(m),Y(m),Z(m) Optional columns: Longitude(d), Latitude(d), Altitude(m).

StringVectorProperty.name: FileName
StringVectorProperty.label: FileName
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: The path to the CSV formated file to read.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Time Offset
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: TimeOffset (in seconds) relative to the system clock.

IntVectorProperty.name: ConvertAnglesToRadians
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If true consider orientation angles are in degrees and convert them to radians.

ReaderFactory.file_description: CSV formated file containing a pose trajectory
